[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: An anime-style blonde girl with a large pink-and-white bow and blue eyes stands in front of a garden-like background while the text “BAIM SAYANG” appears across the lower left.

Main Subject:
A stylized anime character with light blonde hair, blue eyes, and a pink face with a small open mouth is shown from the shoulders up. She has a large pale pink and white bow with a blue center tied on the top right side of her head, and her hair falls in bangs and curls around her face. Her hand is raised near her chin, with her fingers partially visible, and she wears a light-colored outfit with a high, light collar.

Setting:
The background is an outdoor-looking, garden scene with soft-focus green foliage and small pastel flowers. A curved gray structure resembling an arched gate or frame appears behind her on the left side.

Visual Details:
The character is centered slightly to the right, with bright, saturated colors and a smooth, illustrated look. Lighting appears evenly bright with a soft depth-of-field effect in the background. The large red text “BAIM SAYANG” with a black outline sits prominently in the lower left area. On the lower right, there is a gray rounded shape with a lighter center that resembles a small icon; the exact details are unclear.

Visible Text:
BAIM SAYANG

Practical Summary:
The image shows an anime-style girl with blonde hair and blue eyes in a garden-like outdoor background. Large red outlined text reading “BAIM SAYANG” overlays the scene.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
